description.english: Take to the skies on your flying sword for the very first time and embrace the vast heaven and earth!
description.schinese: 第一次体验御剑飞行，感受这广阔天地！

displayName.schinese: 修仙不努力，进幡做兄弟

description.english: The Wanhun Banner is yours. Job posting: ¥0/day, no days off, no reincarnation. One perk only — your new bros are always with you. Work hard or move in.
description.schinese: 万魂幡在手，幡内招聘长期有效：无薪、无假、无来世，唯一福利是——师兄们陪你一起飘。修仙不努力，进幡做兄弟。
